Term Sheet for Series B Funding

Company: Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd
UEN: 202312345X

Investor: Venture Growth Partners
Contact: Dr. John Tan Wei Ming
Email: john.tan@venturegrowth.sg
Phone: +65 6123 4567

Investment Amount: SGD 5,000,000

Lead Investor: Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
NRIC: S1234567A

Board Representation: Mr. Ramasamy Muthu will join the board as a representative of the investors.

Valuation: Pre-money valuation of SGD 20,000,000

Company acknowledges that the current project plan does not include a detailed project status report.

SPA: The Series B Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") will include standard liquidation preferences. All parties must review the SPA thoroughly. 

Note: For more information, visit https://quantuminnovations.sg/investors/S1234567A.
